summary: Comprehensive hospital website testing completed. Backend APIs fully tested with 100% success rate (23/23 tests passed). Frontend testing showed successful homepage loading, navigation, and partial appointment booking flow before browser session ended.

design_issues.issue: Browser session crashed during extended testing - may need stability improvements for long test sessions
